- [Rotating AWS Secrets Manager secrets](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/secretsmanager/latest/userguide/rotating-secrets.html)

- [Gateway VPC endpoints](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/vpc/latest/privatelink/gateway-endpoints.html)
- [Amazon Macie User Guide](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/macie/latest/user/what-is-macie.html)
- [AWS CloudTrail User Guide](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/awscloudtrail/latest/userguide/cloudtrail-user-guide.html)
- [CloudTrail data events](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/awscloudtrail/latest/userguide/logging-data-events-with-cloudtrail.html)
- [CloudTrail Lake](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/awscloudtrail/latest/userguide/cloudtrail-lake.html)
- [Amazon CloudWatch Logs](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/logs/WhatIsCloudWatchLogs.html)
- [AWS Config](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/config/latest/developerguide/WhatIsConfig.html)

## Additional AWS references

- [Amazon CloudWatch User Guide](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/monitoring/) — monitoring and quality

- [AWS Glue Data Quality](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/glue/latest/dg/glue-data-quality.html) — data quality rules
- [AWS Well-Architected Data Analytics Lens](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/wellarchitected/latest/analytics-lens/) — capstone architecture
